steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: "Follow their ways" is the phrase explaining Andrew's choice. "Ways" refers to behavioral patterns or lifestyle, so "follow" must mean to copy or adopt.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content:
In context: Andrew has decided NOT to accompany his brothers — he chose not to do what they did. "Follow" here means to copy or do the same as them. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Justify: explain or defend; doesn't fit "follow them away from home." ✗
  • Choice B — Imitate: do as another does; Andrew chose not to imitate his brothers' departure. ✓
  • Choice C — Mention: refer to verbally; doesn't fit the action of accompanying. ✗
  • Choice D — Restore: bring back; doesn't describe a choice about whether to leave. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
